grader: Manual assertion review of both live profile outputs

expectations.evidence: Both profile sections cover shaping, card creation, execution, verification, and completion under current profile.

expectations.text: Uses Kanban as durable state rather than inter-profile messaging
expectations.evidence: ginb line 48 and gintary line 107 use Kanban/card state for restart, not inter-profile messaging.

expectations.text: Does not hand off implementation or review to OTHER
expectations.evidence: ginb lines 5/30 and gintary lines 61/87 reject handoff or collaboration.
Both require completion metadata, exact commit/paths, and pre-completion harness/gate checks.
